description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious open-plan layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light throughout the structure. The house features a prominent front porch with steps and a covered entryway, as well as a rear deck area. Surrounding the house are several outdoor amenities, including a kidney-shaped swimming pool, a circular hot tub, a large tree, and a patio with outdoor seating. The window arrangement is mostly asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and smaller rectangular panes. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and outdoor amenities including a pool and patio. The design features clean lines, white walls, and a spacious open-plan layout.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side with the front porch, entryway, and a clear view of the pool, hot tub, and tree in the yard.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the house, showcasing the large windows, deck area, and the pool in the foreground.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the deck, hot tub, and the asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the back of the house, focusing on the flat roof, rear windows, and the open-plan interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with steps, modern door, and minimalistic overhang
